SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF VICTORE JAMES IRELAND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR & PARTS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MIKE GOMEZ, OWNER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WAS NOT SERVED. DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO PROPER SERVICE. DEFENDANT ALSO INDICATED THAT PROPER NAME OF DEFENDANT IS "ZEMOG II DBA A & A AUTO REPAIR & PARTS". PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF IS SEEKING A RE-WEIGHING OF THE EVIDENCE AFTER HAVING HAD A FULL AND FAIR HEARING. HE IS NOT ENTITLED TO A SECOND TRIAL ON HIS CLAIM.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR, 10949 NORTH MATHER BLVC. RANCHO CHORDOVA, 95670 - CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS .
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (WITH PROOF OF SERVICE OTHER THAN FORM SC-107 <PAGE 3>)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRELAND, VICTOR JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR & PARTS MIKE GOMEZ OWNER PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE BY A PROPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT'S NEGLECT CAUSED DAMAGE TO HIS CAR ENGINE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
